userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want read state persisted so notification state survives sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification persistence stores read or unread state.

userStories.title: Render notification list and unread badge
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification list and unread badge so updates are visible.
acceptanceCriteria: UI renders unread badge and notification list.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Mark notification read or unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want mark read or unread so I can manage notification state.
acceptanceCriteria: Server logic updates read state for notification.

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want filter by read state so I can focus unread messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification filter supports all, unread, and read values.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear all read notifications so only active items remain.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear action removes or archives notifications in read state.
